mapper.sql: select i.issue_id, i.project_id, p.project_name, i.module_id, i.module_name_snapshot, i.issue_title, i.priority, i.status, i.owner_side, i.current_summary, i.status_detail, i.remark, i.create_by, i.create_time, i.update_by, i.update_time, i.del_flag from fe_issue_item i left join fe_issue_project p on i.project_id = p.project_id
